title: Replicate credentials missing Bearer prefix
symptom: The workflow hangs when trying to execute a node that requires Replicate credentials, indicating an authentication issue.
not_this_if: Credentials are correctly set with Bearer prefix
root_cause: The Replicate API requires the Authorization header to be formatted with the prefix 'Bearer '. If the token is pasted without this prefix, the API will reject the request, causing the workflow to hang.
fix_steps: Update the Authorization field to include 'Bearer ' followed by your API token
agent_instruction: Ensure the Authorization header includes 'Bearer ' followed by your API token.
